title: comarostaphylis spinulosa subsp. glandulifera
intro: Comarostaphylis spinulosa subsp. glandulifera, also known as the glandular comarostaphylis, is a plant species native to New Caledonia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against infections. Comarostaphylis spinulosa subsp. glandulifera is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
